candidate_definition_hints.text: Installation and manager for Oh My Posh! The one thing you need to browse themes, install fonts, and configure shells
A terminal UI (TUI) that sets up **[Oh My Posh](https://ohmyposh.dev)** from scratch - no prior knowledge needed.
